name: Mexicali Corn Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
2. Add the taco seasoning and chives to the saucepan.
3. Stir until combined.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the popped popcorn in a large serving bowl.
5. Toss lightly to coat the popcorn with the seasoned butter mixture.
6. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 quarts.
